concept: Beacon de rally ciano e âmbar com quatro chevrons direcionais, anéis de arena expansivos e pulso central.
selectionRationale: Feedback de arena novo, distinto do retículo de perigo e do pulso territorial existentes; a expansão radial comunica confirmação/convocação de zona sem alterar o runtime.
prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: high-resolution 2D sprite-sheet source for a Bomba PvP arena feedback effect. Primary request: create a coherent 4x4 storyboard grid with 16 sequential frames of an arena rally beacon: a compact cyan-and-amber signal core on the floor, four short directional chevrons rising around it, concentric arena brackets expanding outward, a brighter pulse at the midpoint, then a clean contraction back to the compact beacon. Each cell must contain exactly one centered frame with generous padding and identical framing, clearly readable pixel-art VFX silhouette, no text and no UI. Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background, no floor, no shadow, no gradient, no texture. Subject: isolated beacon and radiating floor feedback marks. Style/medium: crisp high-resolution pixel-art game VFX with limited cyan, amber, white and deep-blue accents, hard readable edges with restrained glow. Composition/framing: square 4x4 grid, row-major temporal order, centered subject in every cell, consistent scale, 16 distinct but smoothly progressing frames. Lighting/mood: competitive arena confirmation, energetic but clean. Color palette: cyan-blue, amber-gold, white highlight, navy accents; never use magenta in the subject. Materials/textures: luminous energy strokes and compact pixel clusters. Constraints: keep the chroma-key background perfectly uniform; preserve a full transparent-safe margin around every frame; no text, logos, watermark, characters, bomb, sparks, smoke, fire, or UI. Avoid: inconsistent camera framing, duplicate frames, cut-off marks, empty cells, perspective scenery, and any nonuniform background.

source.resolutionNote: A geração entregue pelo image_gen é nativa em 1254x1254; source-upscaled-2048.png é somente um derivado ampliado e não uma fonte nativa 2048px.

pipeline.alphaProcessing: Remoção do chroma-key magenta e recorte interno de 40px; extensão transparente centralizada para impedir contato com as bordas.

grok.requestedTask: Conferir a grade 4x4, tentar extrair frames e validar alpha, ordem, timing e bordas internas.
grok.result: Invoke-GrokWorker.ps1 retornou exit code 1 após a mensagem inicial e não criou arquivos.

pipeline.fallback: Extração, atlases, contact sheet, GIF e validação concluídos localmente com ImageMagick.

validation.visualInspection: Contact sheet inspecionado; beacon, expansão radial, pulso central e contração permanecem legíveis em todos os estágios.

license: Visual gerado nesta thread; nenhum recurso externo ou pack adotado.
